PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

ASK
WHERE {
  { # all BOMs with parts from russia
    SELECT ?bom
    WHERE {
      ?bom pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .
      ?bomPart pv:hasPart ?hw .
      ?hw pv:hasSupplier ?suppl .
      ?suppl pv:addressCountry ?country .
      FILTER (CONTAINS(LCASE(?country), LCASE("Russia")))
    }
  }

  # services eligible for parts associated with these BOMs?
  ?s a pv:Service .
  ?s pv:eligibleFor ?hw .
  ?bom pv:hasBomPart ?bomPart .
  ?bomPart pv:hasPart ?hw .
}
generated: PREFIX ns2: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/> SELECT DISTINCT ?supplier ?country WHERE { ?supplier ns2:country ?country }

PREFIX prod: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/> SELECT ?hardwareName ?priceAmount ?supplierName ?country WHERE { ?hardware a prod:Hardware . ?hardware prod:name ?hardwareName . ?hardware prod:price ?price . ?price prod:amount ?priceAmount . ?hardware prod:hasSupplier ?supplier . ?supplier prod:country ?country . ?supplier prod:name ?supplierName . } ORDER BY DESC(?priceAmount) LIMIT 10 OFFSET 5

PREFIX : <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/> SELECT ?department ?departmentName (COUNT(?employee) AS ?employeeCount) WHERE { ?employee a :Employee . ?employee :memberOf ?department . ?department :name ?departmentName . } GROUP BY ?department ?departmentName HAVING (COUNT(?employee) > 5)

PREFIX prod: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/> SELECT ?category (MIN(?weight) AS ?minWeight) (MAX(?weight) AS ?maxWeight) WHERE { ?product a prod:Hardware ; prod:hasCategory ?category ; prod:weight_g ?weight . } GROUP BY ?category

PREFIX prod: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/> SELECT ?supplier (AVG(?priceAmount) AS ?averagePrice) WHERE { ?product prod:hasSupplier ?supplier . ?product prod:price ?price . ?price prod:amount ?priceAmount . ?price prod:currency 'EUR' . } GROUP BY ?supplier

PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?d WHERE { ?d a <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/Department> . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?p <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/responsibleFor> ?d . ?p <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/hasProductManager> ?m } }

OPTIONAL { ?supplier <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/addressCountry> ?addressCountry . } OPTIONAL { ?supplier <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/addressLocality> ?addressLocality . } OPTIONAL { ?supplier <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/addressText> ?addressText . } OPTIONAL { ?supplier <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/addressCountryCode> ?addressCountryCode . } }

PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX prodi: <http://ld.company.org/prod-instances/>
PREFIX pv: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/>

SELECT ?bom (COUNT(?part) AS ?partCount) (SUM(?qty) AS ?totalQty)
WHERE {
  ?bom a pv:BillOfMaterial ;
    pv:hasBomPart ?part .
  ?part pv:quantity ?qty_ .
  BIND(xsd:int(?qty_) AS ?qty)
}
GROUP BY ?bom
HAVING (SUM(?qty) > 600)
ORDER BY DESC(SUM(?qty))
generated: PREFIX prod: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/> SELECT ?bom (COUNT(?part) AS ?numParts) (SUM(?quantity) AS ?totalQuantity) WHERE { ?bom a prod:BillOfMaterial . ?bom prod:hasBomPart ?bomPart . ?bomPart prod:hasPart ?part . ?bomPart prod:quantity ?quantity . } GROUP BY ?bom HAVING (SUM(?quantity) > 600) ORDER BY DESC(?totalQuantity)

PREFIX foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> PREFIX prod: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/> SELECT DISTINCT ?name ?email ?phone ?department ?directReport WHERE { ?employee a prod:Employee . ?employee prod:name ?name . ?employee prod:email ?email . ?employee prod:phone ?phone . ?employee prod:memberOf ?dept . ?dept a prod:Department . ?dept prod:name ?department . ?employee prod:hasManager ?manager . ?manager a prod:Manager . ?manager prod:name ?directReport . }

PREFIX prod-vocab: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/> SELECT DISTINCT ?item ?width ?height ?depth WHERE { ?item a prod-vocab:Hardware ; prod-vocab:width_mm ?width ; prod-vocab:height_mm ?height ; prod-vocab:depth_mm ?depth . FILTER (?width > ?height && ?depth < 50) }

PREFIX prod: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/> SELECT ?id ?name WHERE { ?product a prod:Hardware ; prod:productId ?id ; prod:productName ?name . ?product prod:hasProductManager ?employee . FILTER NOT EXISTS { ?employee a prod:Employee . } }

PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> SELECT ?manager (COUNT(DISTINCT ?directReportSameDepartment) AS ?countSameDepartment) (COUNT(DISTINCT ?directReport) AS ?totalDirectReports) WHERE { ?manager a <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/Manager> . ?manager <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/hasDirectReport> ?directReport . OPTIONAL { ?directReport <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/memberOf> ?department . ?manager <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/memberOf> ?department . BIND(?directReport AS ?directReportSameDepartment) } } GROUP BY ?manager

PREFIX prod: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/> SELECT ?bom (AVG(?priceAmount) AS ?avgPrice) WHERE { ?bom a prod:BillOfMaterial . ?bom prod:hasBomPart ?bomPart . ?bomPart prod:hasPart ?product . ?product a prod:Hardware . ?product prod:price ?price . ?price prod:amount ?priceAmount } GROUP BY ?bom ORDER BY DESC(?avgPrice) LIMIT 1

PREFIX prod-vocab: <http://ld.company.org/prod-vocab/> SELECT DISTINCT ?productA ?productB WHERE { ?productA prod-vocab:compatibleProduct ?productB . ?productB prod-vocab:compatibleProduct ?productA . }
